info.title: MonitorManagementClient
info.description: Azure Monitor client to create/update/delete metric based alerts.

get.description: Retrieve alert rule definitions in a subscription.
Retrieve alert rule definitions in a resource group.

put.description: Create or update an metric alert definition.

parameters.name: parameters
parameters.description: The parameters of the rule to create or update.

parameters.name: parameters
parameters.description: The parameters of the rule to update.

AggregationTypeEnum.description: The criteria time aggregation types. Previously undocumented values might be returned

operator.description: The operator used to compare the metric value against the threshold. Previously undocumented values might be returned

alertSensitivity.description: The extent of deviation required to trigger an alert. This will affect how tight the threshold is to the metric series pattern. Previously undocumented values might be returned

failingPeriods.description: The minimum number of violations required within the selected lookback time window required to raise an alert.

ignoreDataBefore.description: Use this option to set the date from which to start learning the metric historical data and calculate the dynamic thresholds (in ISO8601 format)

DynamicPromQLCriteria.description: The criterion for dynamic prom query.

operator.description: The operator used to compare the metric value against the threshold. Previously undocumented values might be returned

alertSensitivity.description: The extent of deviation required to trigger an alert. This will affect how tight the threshold is to the metric series pattern. Previously undocumented values might be returned

ignoreDataBefore.description: Use this option to set the date from which to start learning the metric historical data and calculate the dynamic thresholds (in ISO8601 format)

DynamicThresholdFailingPeriods.description: The minimum number of violations required within the selected lookback time window required to raise an alert.

numberOfEvaluationPeriods.description: The number of aggregated lookback points. The lookback time window is calculated based on the aggregation granularity (windowSize) and the selected number of aggregated points.

minFailingPeriodsToAlert.description: The number of violations to trigger an alert. Should be smaller or equal to numberOfEvaluationPeriods.

DynamicThresholdOperator.description: The operator used to compare the metric value against the threshold. Previously undocumented values might be returned

DynamicThresholdSensitivity.description: The extent of deviation required to trigger an alert. This will affect how tight the threshold is to the metric series pattern. Previously undocumented values might be returned

actionGroupId.description: The id of the action group to use.

webHookProperties.description: This field allows specifying custom properties, which would be appended to the alert payload sent as input to the webhook.

MetricAlertCriteria.description: The rule criteria that defines the conditions of the alert rule.

odata.type.description: Specifies the type of the alert criteria. Previously undocumented values might be returned

MetricAlertErrorResponse.description: Describes the format of Error response.

MetricAlertMultipleResourceMultipleMetri.description: Specifies the metric alert criteria for multiple resource that has multiple metric criteria.

allOf.description: The list of multiple metric criteria for this 'all of' operation.

description.description: The description of the metric alert that will be included in the alert email.

enabled.description: The flag that indicates whether the metric alert is enabled.

scopes.description: The list of resource id's that this metric alert is scoped to. You cannot change the scope of a metric rule based on logs.

evaluationFrequency.description: How often the metric alert is evaluated represented in ISO 8601 duration format.

windowSize.description: The period of time (in ISO 8601 duration format) that is used to monitor alert activity based on the threshold.

targetResourceType.description: The resource type of the target resource(s) on which the alert is created/updated. Mandatory if the scope contains a subscription, resource group, or more than one resource.

targetResourceRegion.description: The region of the target resource(s) on which the alert is created/updated. Mandatory if the scope contains a subscription, resource group, or more than one resource.

criteria.description: Defines the specific alert criteria information.

autoMitigate.description: The flag that indicates whether the alert should be auto resolved or not. The default is true.

resolveConfiguration.description: The configuration for how the alert is resolved. Applicable for PromQLCriteria.

actions.description: The array of actions that are performed when the alert rule becomes active, and when an alert condition is resolved.

lastUpdatedTime.description: Last time the rule was updated in ISO8601 format.

isMigrated.description: The value indicating whether this alert rule is migrated.

customProperties.description: The properties of an alert payload.

actionProperties.description: The properties of an action properties.

MetricAlertPropertiesPatch.description: An alert rule properties for patch.

description.description: The description of the metric alert that will be included in the alert email.

enabled.description: The flag that indicates whether the metric alert is enabled.

scopes.description: The list of resource id's that this metric alert is scoped to.

evaluationFrequency.description: How often the metric alert is evaluated represented in ISO 8601 duration format.

windowSize.description: The period of time (in ISO 8601 duration format) that is used to monitor alert activity based on the threshold.

targetResourceType.description: The resource type of the target resource(s) on which the alert is created/updated. Mandatory for MultipleResourceMultipleMetricCriteria.

targetResourceRegion.description: The region of the target resource(s) on which the alert is created/updated. Mandatory for MultipleResourceMultipleMetricCriteria.

criteria.description: Defines the specific alert criteria information.

autoMitigate.description: The flag that indicates whether the alert should be auto resolved or not. The default is true.

resolveConfiguration.description: The configuration for how the alert is resolved. Applicable for PromQLCriteria.

actions.description: The array of actions that are performed when the alert rule becomes active, and when an alert condition is resolved.

lastUpdatedTime.description: Last time the rule was updated in ISO8601 format.

isMigrated.description: The value indicating whether this alert rule is migrated.

customProperties.description: The properties of an alert payload.

actionProperties.description: The properties of an action properties.

properties.description: The alert rule properties of the resource.

MetricAlertResourceCollection.description: Represents a collection of alert rule resources.

value.description: The values for the alert rule resources.

nextLink.description: The URL to get the next set of results.

MetricAlertResourcePatch.description: The metric alert resource for patch operations.

properties.description: The alert rule properties of the resource.

MetricAlertSingleResourceMultipleMetricC.description: Specifies the metric alert criteria for a single resource that has multiple metric criteria.

allOf.description: The list of metric criteria for this 'all of' operation.

properties.description: The alert status properties of the metric alert status.

MetricAlertStatusCollection.description: Represents a collection of alert rule resources.

value.description: The values for the alert rule resources.

dimensions.description: An object describing the type of the dimensions.

timestamp.description: UTC time when the status was checked.

operator.description: The criteria operator. Previously undocumented values might be returned

threshold.description: The criteria threshold value that activates the alert.

operator.description: The dimension operator. Only 'Include' and 'Exclude' are supported

Microsoft.Common.CriterionType.description: Specifies the type of threshold criteria. Previously undocumented values might be returned

Microsoft.Common.ErrorDetail.description: Describes details of an error response.

code.description: Unlocalized string which can be used to programmatically identify the error.

message.description: Describes the error in detail and provides debugging information.

target.description: The target of the particular error (for example, the name of the property in error).

additionalInfo.description: An array of objects with 'type' and 'info' properties. The schema of 'info' is service-specific and dependent on the 'type' string.

info.description: The additional information specific to the type.

code.description: Unlocalized string which can be used to programmatically identify the error.

message.description: Describes the error in detail and provides debugging information. If Accept-Language is set in the request, it must be localized to that language.

target.description: The target of the particular error (for example, the name of the property in error).

details.description: An array of additional nested error response info objects, as described by this contract.

additionalInfo.description: An array of objects with 'type' and 'info' properties. The schema of 'info' is service-specific and dependent on the 'type' string.

info.description: The additional information specific to the type.

principalId.description: The principal ID of resource identity.

userAssignedIdentities.description: The list of user identities associated with the resource. The user identity dictionary key references will be ARM resource ids in the form: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/{identityName}'.

Microsoft.Common.UserIdentityProperties.description: Properties of the user assigned identity.

principalId.description: The principal ID of resource identity.

clientId.description: The client ID of resource identity.

MultiMetricCriteria.description: The types of conditions for a multi resource alert.

criterionType.description: Specifies the type of threshold criteria. Previously undocumented values might be returned

timeAggregation.description: The criteria time aggregation types. Previously undocumented values might be returned

skipMetricValidation.description: Allows creating an alert rule on a custom metric that isn't yet emitted, by causing the metric validation to be skipped.

MultiPromQLCriteria.description: The types of conditions for a multi query metric alert.

criterionType.description: Specifies the type of threshold criteria. Previously undocumented values might be returned

query.description: The query used to evaluate the alert rule

Odatatype.description: Specifies the type of the alert criteria. Previously undocumented values might be returned

Operator.description: The criteria operator. Previously undocumented values might be returned

PromQLCriteria.description: Specifies the PromQL criteria for the metric alert resource.

failingPeriods.description: Configuration for failing periods in query-based alerts.

allOf.description: The list of promQL criteria. Alert will be raised when all conditions are met.

QueryFailingPeriods.description: Configuration for failing periods in query-based alerts.

for.description: The amount of time (in ISO 8601 duration format) alert must be active before firing.

autoResolved.description: Indicates whether the alert should be auto resolved

timeToResolve.description: The time (in ISO 8601 duration format) after which the alert should be auto resolved

StaticPromQLCriteria.description: The criterion for static prom query.

WebtestLocationAvailabilityCriteria.description: Specifies the metric alert rule criteria for a web test resource.

webTestId.description: The Application Insights web test Id.
